title: Janusar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Janusar''' was a [[City/Legends|city]] on the northern continent of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ranklinge]]. It had a decent port and air-defense systems despite being a smaller city. [[Market Street (Janusar)|Market Street]] was located in the city.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
